name: Applyra
description: Applyra — ASO platform built for indie developers with side-by-side iOS and Android keyword tracking, AI-powered suggestions, competitor analysis and permanent free tier.

seo.title: Applyra — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Applyra: Applyra — ASO platform built for indie developers with side-by-side iOS and Android keyword tracking, AI-powered suggestions, competitor analysis and p

when_to_use: Free keyword rank tracking for solo iOS or Android developers
Side-by-side App Store and Google Play keyword comparison
AI-powered keyword suggestions for early-stage app growth
Competitor keyword gap analysis with permanent free tier

pros: Side-by-side iOS and Android keyword tracking
Permanent free tier aimed at indie devs
cons: Smaller dataset than Sensor Tower or MobileAction
Free tier limits on high-volume tracking
Newer brand with shorter track record
review.verdict: Genuinely indie-friendly ASO tool that beats most freemium rivals for cross-platform tracking.
review.best_for: Indie devs who ship to both iOS and Android on tight budgets
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep market intel and dedicated support
